ques: Find a dog bed on Amazon that is washable and has a length of at least 30 inches.
answer: Orthopedic Dog Bed for Large Dogs - Gel Memory Foam Pet Bed with Waterproof & Washable Cover (Grey, 36.0" L x 27.0" W x 6.7" Th) — it is machine washable (removable washable cover) and 36 inches long, which is ≥ 30 inches.
